name: Mimikatz Execution
notes:
This rule detects well-known Mimikatz command line arguments.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov, oscd.community, David ANDRE (additional keywords), Tim Shelton
SIGMA Title: HackTool - Mimikatz Execution
SIGMA Description: Detection well-known mimikatz command line arguments


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%dumpcreds%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%mimikatz%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::aadcookie%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::detours%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::memssp%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::mflt%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::ncroutemon%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::ngcsign%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::printnightmare%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::skeleton%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::preshutdown%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::mstsc%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::multirdp%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%rpc::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%token::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%crypto::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%dpapi::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%sekurlsa::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%kerberos::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%lsadump::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%privilege::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%process::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vault::%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Mimikatz Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%dumpcreds%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%mimikatz%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::aadcookie%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::detours%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::memssp%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::mflt%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::ncroutemon%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::ngcsign%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::printnightmare%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::skeleton%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::preshutdown%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::mstsc%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%::multirdp%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%rpc::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%token::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%crypto::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%dpapi::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%sekurlsa::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%kerberos::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%lsadump::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%privilege::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%process::%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vault::%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects well-known Mimikatz command line arguments
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
